case_title: NATALIE KESSEL VS. THE WALSTON LEGAL GROUP, PC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KESSEL, NATALIE AS TO DEFENDANT THE WALSTON LEGAL GROUP, PC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KESSEL, NATALIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE WALSTON LEGAL GROUP, PC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $610.80 PRINCIPAL, $3.68 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $814.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
